lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੀਚਨਿ ਲਖ ਉਪਾਵ ਤਾਂ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਘੁਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: je keechan lakh upaav taan kahee na ghuleeai |
lines.english: Making thousands of efforts, they are still not eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਦੁਖ ਸੰਤਾਪ ਜਾਂ ਤੁਧਹੁ ਭੁਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe dukh santaap jaan tudhahu bhuleeai |
lines.english: When I forget You, I endure all pains and afflictions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ਸੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਹਾਂਢੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis no visarai naau su jonee haandteeai |
lines.english: One who forgets the Name, wanders in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ਸੁ ਨਿਰਧਨੁ ਕਾਂਢੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis no visarai naau su niradhan kaandteeai |
lines.english: One who forgets the Name, is known as a poor person.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਖਸਮੁ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਚਿਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਮੁ ਡੰਡੁ ਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: jis khasam na aavai chit tis jam ddandd de |
lines.english: One who does not remember his Lord and Master, is punished by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਖਸਮੁ ਨ ਆਵੀ ਚਿਤਿ ਰੋਗੀ ਸੇ ਗਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jis khasam na aavee chit rogee se gane |
lines.english: One who does not remember his Lord and Master, is judged to be a sick person.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਖਸਮੁ ਨ ਆਵੀ ਚਿਤਿ ਸੁ ਖਰੋ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis khasam na aavee chit su kharo ahankaareea |
lines.english: One who does not remember his Lord and Master, is egotistical and proud.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਦੁਹੇਲਾ ਜਗਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਉ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: soee duhelaa jag jin naau visaareea |14|
lines.english: One who forgets the Name is miserable in this world. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਡੀ ਬੰਦਸਿ ਮੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਡਿਠਾ ਤੂ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: taiddee bandas mai koe na dditthaa too naanak man bhaanaa |
lines.english: I have not seen any other like You. You alone are pleasing to Nanak's mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋਲਿ ਘੁਮਾਈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਵਿਚੋਲੇ ਜੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਪਛਾਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ghol ghumaaee tis mitr vichole jai mil kant pachhaanaa |1|
lines.english: I am a dedicated, devoted sacrifice to that friend, that mediator, who leads me to recognize my Husband Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਜਾਂ ਤਉ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਜੀਉ ਪਇਆ ਤਉ ਸਰਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mukh suhaavaa jaan tau jas gaavai jeeo peaa tau saranee |2|
lines.english: Beautiful is that mouth which sings Your Praises; beautiful is that soul which seeks Your Sanctuary. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵ ਸੁਹਾਵੇ ਜਾਂ ਤਉ ਧਿਰਿ ਜੁਲਦੇ ਸੀਸੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਚਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: paav suhaave jaan tau dhir julade sees suhaavaa charanee |
lines.english: Beautiful are those feet which walk towards You; beautiful is that head which falls at Your Feet.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਰੀ ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mil naaree satasang mangal gaaveea |
lines.english: Meeting the Lord's brides, in the True Congregation, I sing the songs of joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਕਾ ਹੋਆ ਬੰਧਾਨੁ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਧਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghar kaa hoaa bandhaan bahurr na dhaaveea |
lines.english: The home of my heart is now held steady, and I shall not go out wandering again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਇਕ ਰੀਤਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar ik ik reetaaveea |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, the One and only Lord is my way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਠੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੁਰਤੁ ਸੋਇ ਕੂੜਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: binatthee duramat durat soe koorraaveea |
lines.english: Evil-mindedness has been dispelled, along with sin and my bad reputation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਲਵੰਤਿ ਪਰਧਾਨਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਚਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: seelavant paradhaan ridai sachaaveea |
lines.english: I am well-known as being calm and good-natured; my heart is filled with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਭਾ ਬਣੀ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਖਸਮਿ ਜਾਂ ਰਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sobhaa banee seegaar khasam jaan raaveea |
lines.english: I am glorified and embellished, when my Lord and Master enjoys me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਚਰਣ ਦਾਸਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: man darasan kee piaas charan daasaaveea |
lines.english: My mind is thirsty for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. I am a slave at His feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭਿ ਗੁਣ ਤੈਡੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਉ ਮੈ ਕੂ ਥੀਏ ਮੈ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਤੇ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: habh gun taidde naanak jeeo mai koo thee mai niragun te kiaa hovai |
lines.english: All virtues are Yours, Dear Lord; You bestow them upon us. I am unworthy - what can I achieve, O Nanak?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੀਆ ਆਇ ਸੰਜੋਗਿ ਜਾਂ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੀਆ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: mileea aae sanjog jaan tis bhaaveea |15|
lines.english: I meet Him through my blessed destiny, when it is pleasing to His Will. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਛਿਜੰਦੜੀ ਊਣ ਮਝੂਣਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਜਣਿ ਜੀਉ ਧਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: deh chhijandarree aoon majhoonaa gur sajan jeeo dharaaeaa |
lines.english: My body was wasting away, and I was depressed. The Guru, my Friend, has encouraged and consoled me.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਚਕੁ ਸਦਾ ਜਾਚੋਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau jevadd daataar na koee jaachak sadaa jaachovai |1|
lines.english: There is no other Giver as great as You. I am a beggar; I beg from You forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਸੁਖ ਸੁਹੇਲੜਾ ਸੁਤਾ ਜਿਤਾ ਜਗੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: habhe sukh suhelarraa sutaa jitaa jag sabaaeaa |2|
lines.english: I sleep in total peace and comfort; I have conquered the whole world. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਚਉਰੁ ਛਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: sir saahaa paatisaahu nihachal chaur chhat |
lines.english: You are the Emperor over the heads of kings. Your canopy and chauree (fly-brush) are permanent and unchanging.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ਸਚਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਤਖਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa teraa darabaar sachaa tudh takhat |
lines.english: The Darbaar of Your Court is glorious and great. Your holy throne is True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਭਾਵੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸੋਈ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo bhaavai paarabraham soee sach niaau |
lines.english: That alone is true justice, which is pleasing to the Will of the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕੀਨੑੀ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ਸਾਈ ਭਲੀ ਗਲ ॥
lines.translit: jo keenaee karataar saaee bhalee gal |
lines.english: Whatever the Creator Lord does, is a good thing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: je bhaavai paarabraham nithaave milai thaau |
lines.english: Even the homeless receive a home, when it is pleasing to the Will of the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਸੇ ਦਰਗਾਹ ਮਲ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee pachhaataa khasam se daragaah mal |
lines.english: Those who recognize their Lord and Master, are seated in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਣ ਕਰਣ ਕਰੀਮ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤੇਰੀਐ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: kaaran karan kareem kudarat tereeai |16|
lines.english: O Merciful Lord, Cause of causes, Your creative power is all-powerful. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਫੁਰਮਾਨੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਫੇਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sahee teraa furamaan kinai na fereeai |
lines.english: True is Your Command; no one can challenge it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਧਿ ਜੁਲੰਦੜੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਠੰਢਾ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pandh julandarree meraa andar tthandtaa gur darasan dekh nihaalee |1|
lines.english: Walking on the Path, I have found cool tranquility deep within; gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, I am enraptured. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਇ ਸੁਣੰਦੜੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਉਲਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੰਦੜੀ ਲਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: soe sunandarree meraa tan man maulaa naam japandarree laalee |
lines.english: Hearing of You, my body and mind have blossomed forth; chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, I am flushed with life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਲਿ ਨ ਘਿਧਾ ਮੈ ਕੂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: mul na ghidhaa mai koo satigur ditaa |
lines.english: I was not charged for it; the True Guru gave it to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਠ ਮੰਝਾਹੂ ਮੈ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਲਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: hatth manjhaahoo mai maanak ladhaa |
lines.english: I have found the jewel within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath naanak jitaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have conquered this priceless human life. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਢੂੰਢ ਵਞਾਈ ਥੀਆ ਥਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: dtoondt vayaaee theea thitaa |
lines.english: My search has ended, and I have become stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਇ ਸੋ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai masatak karam hoe so sevaa laagaa |
lines.english: One who has such good karma inscribed upon his forehead, is committed to the Lord's service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਸੋ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis gur mil kamal pragaasiaa so anadin jaagaa |
lines.english: One whose heart lotus blossoms forth upon meeting the Guru, remains awake and aware, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਸਭੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: lagaa rang charanaarabind sabh bhram bhau bhaagaa |
lines.english: All doubt and fear run away from one who is in love with the Lord's lotus feet.
